title: Support subitem columns in Slack integration notifications
excerpt: By today, the Slack integration only supports item columns in the notify message. I need it to support subitem columns (e.g. subitem’s name, subitem’s status) in the notification. Ideally, all types of column that are su…

posts.author: enanni (Edi Nanni)
posts.cookedHtml: By today, the Slack integration only supports item columns in the notify message. I need it to support subitem columns (e.g. subitem’s name, subitem’s status) in the notification. Ideally, all types of column that are supported for items should be supported for subitems. This is especially important when the trigger clause refers to a subitem column, like subitem status.

posts.author: firoz (mohamad firoz)
posts.cookedHtml:
yeah it is really crucial features that monday need to add urgently because when sub-items columns messages are required to be provided on slack then its next to impossible despite of very important features.

The same question was raised by me:

Add sub-items columns on automation recipe for easy information Feature requests
When i want to send custom message to my team member on slack for sub-items as: Hey team {sub-item-columnName1} is reviewed and please check the task. In this case, i am unable to add sub-item-columnName in the automation recipe as the auto populated columns are only of parent item but not sub-items. so here the custom free notifcation on slack gets failed and there is no use of sub-items columns in automation. It should be very crucial feature to be added.
